form.name: CWDB Deck Quote Request
form.description: Homeowner intake form built with Webflow native forms, embedded on homepage, city pages, and /get-a-quote. Triggers Make webhook on submission.

fields.label: What type of project is this?
fields.name: project_type

fields.label: When are you looking to start?
fields.name: timeline

fields.label: Anything else we should know about your project?
fields.name: notes
fields.placeholder: Deck size, materials, special features, etc.

fields.label: TCPA Consent
fields.name: tcpa_consent
fields.text: I agree to receive calls, text messages, and emails from Central Wisconsin Deck Builders, LLC and its contractor partners about my project request. Consent is not a condition of receiving a quote. Msg & data rates may apply. Reply STOP to opt out.

legal_blockers.tcpa_consent_checkbox: RESOLVED 2026-04-07 — finalized consent language deployed to field id 10
legal_blockers.privacy_policy_page: Must be published at /privacy before ads run or forms go live

post_submit.note: Webflow form submission triggers a Make webhook. Configure the webhook URL in Webflow Project Settings → Integrations → Webhooks.
